name: SpotifyC2
description: SpotifyC2 is a cybersecurity research project that demonstrates cloud-based command communication using Spotify playlists for command retrieval and Telegram for output delivery, without requiring the Spotify Web API.

name: GPT-5.6-Sol-Free
description: GPT-5.6-Sol-Free OpenAI's flagship reasoning LLM (June 2026). SOTA on TerminalBench 2.1. Sol / Terra / Luna tiers with ultra reasoning mode. Outperforms Claude Mythos 5 on coding & cybersecurity benchmarks. Free ChatGPT desktop app, API guides, prompt templates & agentic workflow examples.

name: hacksguard
description: A blazingly fast, multi-threaded TUI malware analysis tool built in Rust. Features deep PE parsing, YARA scanning, and heuristic risk scoring.

name: osint-terminal
description: Self-hosted OSINT dashboard: 400+ keyless recon tools, a live 3D threat globe, and batch/case   investigation workflows, no API keys required.

name: lockstep
description: Lockstep is a personal security checklist platform. It helps users track security habits, checklist progress, priorities, and profile-based progress from a clean web interface.

name: OSINT-Tools-Nigeria
description: A specialized OSINT framework for high-signal investigations focused exclusively on the Nigerian landscape.
